SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff

Class CoffSectionTable

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.CoffSectionTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<CoffSection>, Collection<CoffSection>, List<CoffSection>, SequencedCollection<CoffSection>, IndirectList<CoffSection>, StreamWritable, Writable
public class CoffSectionTable extends Object implements IndirectList<CoffSection>, Writable
COFF section table containing all sections in the file. Sections represent code, data, and other segments.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    RECORD_LENGTH
    Length in bytes of one COFF section header record.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    CoffSectionTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Builder builder)
    Creates an empty section table for a builder-backed COFF file.
    protected
    CoffSectionTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser)
    Creates a lazily loaded section table for a parser-backed COFF file.

  • Constructor Details

    • CoffSectionTable

      protected CoffSectionTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Builder builder)
      Creates an empty section table for a builder-backed COFF file.
      Parameters:
      coff - parent COFF file
      builder - COFF file builder

    • CoffSectionTable

      protected CoffSectionTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser)
      Creates a lazily loaded section table for a parser-backed COFF file.
      Parameters:
      coff - parent COFF file
      parser - COFF file parser

    • get

      public CoffSection get(int index, CoffFile.Parser parser) throws IOException
      Returns the section at a 1-based index, loading it from the file if needed.
      Parameters:
      index - 1-based section index
      parser - COFF file parser
      Returns:
      section at index
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while loading section data
